statement: System MUST expose persisted mapping state via context/surface/mapping structs when manager state is queried or serialized.
System MUST normalize render-context source aliases to canonical camera or asset-store when ingesting/updating context state.
System MUST default context dimensions and capture modes when incoming values are missing/invalid.
System MUST normalize mapping-surface UV/material slots by clamping UV channel and deduplicating valid slots.
System MUST normalize mapping type into canonical surface-uv or surface-projection forms when ingesting mapping state.
System MUST normalize UV mode tokens to direct/feed when writing canonical mapping config.
System MUST normalize projection mode aliases (including surface-uv/surface-feed and direct/feed) into canonical mapping/projection tokens when writing canonical mapping config.
System MUST ensure default UV/projection config blocks exist when mapping config is normalized.
System MUST ensure projection subtype config defaults exist when subtype modes are selected.
System MUST canonicalize feedV2 coordinateSpace to pixel and ensure sources/destinations/routes arrays exist in feed mode.
System MUST sanitize feedV2 entities (ids, dimensions, route defaults, rect defaults/clamps) when preparing feed runtime.
System MUST persist and reload cache with top-level renderContexts/mappingSurfaces/mappings arrays.
System MUST resolve mapping material path by settings override then plugin/project candidate order.
System MUST require RshipContextTexture in material contract validation.
notes: Docs claim broader required contract than current code

statement: System MUST honor content-mapping settings fields from URshipSettings when bootstrapping mapping runtime.
System MUST initialize asset-store client/material/cache and mark mappings dirty when content mapping is enabled.
System MUST save dirty cache and cleanup mapping runtime resources on shutdown.
System MUST run rebuild stage when dirty and refresh stage only under rebuild/continuous-refresh/runtime-prepare conditions.
System MUST debounce cache writes before persisting mutated mapping state.
System MUST compute required contexts from enabled mappings and deactivate/destroy non-required contexts in refresh.
System MUST resolve camera context from camera/source-anchor with fallback camera selection and viewport/player fallback when needed.
System MUST configure capture components using capture profile and main-view CVars during context setup.
System MUST manage depth capture component/render target lifecycle only when depth capture is enabled.
System MUST resolve asset-store textures from local cache or download pipeline for color/depth asset ids.
System MUST resolve mapping surfaces by actorPath exact match first and fallback scored world scan if unresolved.
System MUST require mesh readiness, mapping material availability, and valid material contract before applying mapping to surface.
System MUST emit explicit missing-texture errors and skip apply when no effective mapping texture exists.
notes: No synthetic preview fallback in apply path

statement: System MUST compose feed destination textures from valid enabled routes for matching destination ids.
System SHOULD bypass feed composite RT and bind source texture directly for single full-frame opaque routes.
System MUST reject stale mapping echoes using pending upsert/delete guards and tombstones.
System MUST dirty mappings when coverage preview toggles so debug-coverage parameters reapply.
System MUST expose render-context JSON bridge with context metadata and hasRenderTarget state.
System MUST restore original surface materials and clear runtime MID/hash state on unapply paths.
System MUST dispatch actions by target path prefix to context/surface/mapping action handlers.
System MUST support all registered context action names in HandleContextAction.
notes: Action parity with context RegisterAction list

statement: System MUST support all registered surface action names in HandleSurfaceAction.
notes: Action parity with surface RegisterAction list

statement: System MUST support all registered mapping action names including feed upsert/remove operations in HandleMappingAction.
System MUST safely parse JSON ingress wrappers and no-op invalid JSON in Process*EventJson entrypoints.
System MUST implement render-context upsert/delete ingest semantics with resolve/register/emit and dirty/cache updates.
System MUST implement surface upsert/delete ingest semantics with material restore/feed RT cleanup and target lifecycle updates.
System MUST implement mapping upsert/delete ingest semantics including type alias normalization and stale guard handling.
System MUST propagate CRUD mutations through subsystem SetItem/DelItem and mark mapping/cache dirty.
System MUST register context target actionIds/emitterIds and corresponding Action/Emitter items for transport discovery.
System MUST register surface target actionIds/emitterIds and corresponding Action/Emitter items for transport discovery.
System MUST register mapping target actionIds/emitterIds and corresponding Action/Emitter items for transport discovery.
System MUST emit updated state and mark mappings/cache dirty after successful action handlers.
notes: Normalize/emit/dirty tail in HandleMappingAction and peers

statement: System SHOULD provide panel keyboard shortcuts for quick create/duplicate/toggle and config expand/collapse operations.
System SHOULD persist and restore quick-create defaults and support selected-actor source/screen fallback during quick-create.
System MUST expose canonical map modes and alias normalization in editor mode selectors.
System MUST expose content mode options stretch/crop/fit/pixel-perfect in editor selector UI.
System MUST write mode-specific mapping config and remove incompatible keys when saving/editing mapping form.
System SHOULD provide projection-edit workflow via preview actor spawn/sync/stop controls for projection mappings.
System MUST provide interactive mapping canvas behavior for UV and feed modes including paint and drag/resize/hit-test input.
System SHOULD support filter and errors-only toggles for contexts/surfaces/mappings and visible/total list counts.
System SHOULD support explicit row selection and selected-vs-visible bulk operation scope in panel lists.
System MUST provide feedV2 editing controls and persist generated feedV2 config objects from editor form.
System MUST define content-mapping CVars for perf stats and capture tuning.
System MUST default capture quality profile CVar to balanced profile value 1.
System MUST rate-limit perf logging to roughly once per second when perf stats are enabled.
System SHOULD rate-limit repeated missing-source and missing-texture warnings to avoid log spam.
notes: warning interval guards in resolve/apply paths

statement: System MUST suppress redundant MID writes with per-slot material binding hash caching.
System SHOULD suppress static feed redraws using feed composite signature cache when route/source signature is unchanged.
System MUST avoid explicit CaptureScene calls when bCaptureEveryFrame is enabled to avoid capture inefficiency warnings.
System MUST lazy-load RshipMapping module and instantiate manager class via reflection from subsystem bridge.
System MUST invoke InitializeForSubsystem TickForSubsystem and ShutdownForSubsystem by reflection from subsystem lifecycle.
System MUST forward target action payloads to manager RouteActionJson through reflection bridge.
System MUST forward render-context/surface/mapping event payloads to manager Process*EventJson bridge handlers.
System MUST expose subsystem bridge helpers for mapping debug overlay state and render-context JSON retrieval.
System MUST return null manager when content mapping is disabled in settings.
System MUST declare runtime and editor mapping modules in plugin descriptor with dependency on RshipExec.
System MUST keep runtime/editor build dependencies wired to RshipExec and editor dependency on RshipMapping.
System MUST define project-level deterministic pipeline graph schema types as serializable code-first contracts.
System MUST apply compiled node pipeline plans transactionally by snapshotting current runtime state and rolling back on apply failure.
System MUST force fail-closed strict behavior during compiled pipeline apply by disabling semantic/material fallback paths for the transaction.
notes: Transactional apply sets fallback CVars to 0

statement: System MUST expose pipeline graph validate/compile/apply/rollback manager APIs plus JSON wrappers for reflection bridge invocation.
notes: New manager API surface and JSON wrappers

statement: System MUST provide docked node pipeline editor workflow with one-click Validate/Apply/Revert/Diagnostics controls while retaining legacy controls during rollout.
System MUST enforce DAG-only compile semantics and deterministic topological ordering for node pipeline execution plans.
System MUST forward pipeline graph validate/compile/apply/rollback calls through RshipExec reflection bridge methods.
notes: New subsystem bridge methods for pipeline JSON

statement: System MUST support pluggable endpoint-adapter validation interface for media-profile endpoint bindings in pipeline plans.
